name: Zombie
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.text: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 HP, it makes a Constitution save (DC 5 + the damage taken); on a success it drops to 1 HP instead, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. (Implemented via the event/trigger system.)

strategy: Shamble straight at the nearest living foe and pound it relentlessly; it has no tactics beyond closing to melee.
